pi_items.source: verifier.py logic ('Relay Tower Alpha' in feat_name)
verifier.py SQL query ('Addis Ababa' from world_capitals)
verifier.py distance check logic (dist_km < 60 and comment '~0.5 deg')

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a non-synthetic QField dataset (world_survey.gpkg) containing real-world capital coordinates and iNaturalist observations. The verifier strictly requires a new feature named 'Relay Tower Alpha' to be added within 60 km (approximately 0.5 degrees) of the geographic midpoint between Nairobi and Addis Ababa. The expected geographic midpoint is computed as the average of the coordinates from the 'world_capitals' table.
